label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 21

extraction.one_line_summary: GROVES Kaden won stage 21 in Madrid after EVENEPOEL Remco bridged to a breakaway containing KÄMNA Lennard and DENZ Nico, then GROVES barely held off GANNA Filippo in the final meters.
tactical_patterns: EVENEPOEL Remco bridged to breakaway despite no jersey threat, forcing GROVES to chase and risk green jersey security
GANNA Filippo nearly stole stage from closing peloton in final 500m despite no leadout, showing pure power closing capability
Break hesitated pre-flamme rouge with 12-20 second gap, allowing peloton near-catch where committed tempo would have held off sprinters

rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: positive: secured green jersey and third stage win, but bridge effort to EVENEPOEL break revealed vulnerability to tactical pressure
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: initiated winning break despite already securing polka dots, showing aggressive racing beyond jersey obligations
rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: positive: nearly won from chasing group without leadout, demonstrating individual sprint power often underestimated in stage race context
rider_signals.KÄMNA Lennard: neutral: joined early break but faded in final sprint despite being in winning move
rider_signals.DENZ Nico: neutral: in winning break but lacked finishing power when EVENEPOEL and GROVES committed
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: won overall by 17 seconds over VINGEGAARD Jonas in historic Jumbo-Visma 1-2-3 podium lockout
